name: jdy_list_data
description_zh: 按条件查询表单多条数据，支持分页和筛选。设 limit=100 且不传 data_id 时自动全量分页拉取。
description: Query multiple data records from a form. Supports pagination via data_id cursor (pass last record's _id), field selection, and filter conditions. Returns data[] array and total_returned count. Each record includes _id, appId, entryId, creator, createTime, updateTime, and all field values. Max 100 records per call in single mode. **Auto-pagination mode**: when limit=100 and data_id is empty, automatically fetches ALL pages until exhausted and returns the complete record list — use this for deduplication or full-table scans. Filter methods: eq/ne/in/nin/empty/not_empty/range/like/gt/lt/all/verified/unverified. Rate limit: 30/s.

data_id.description: 分页游标：上次查询最后一条记录的_id，首次查询留空。自动分页模式下无需传此参数。

limit.description: 查询条数 1-100，默认10。设为100且不传data_id时触发自动全量分页模式，一次性返回所有数据。

fields.description: 需要返回的字段名列表，不传则返回全部字段。建议只传需要的字段以提升速度。

filter.description: 筛选器，格式：{"rel":"and","cond":[{"field":"字段名","type":"字段类型","method":"eq","value":["值"]}]}

max_records.description: 自动分页模式下最多拉取的记录总数，0表示不限制（全量）。大表建议设置上限避免超时。
